2026-04-26 02:52:53.540 +04:00 [INF] Applying migration '20260425225010_BackfillTableAreaAndSeedMissingTables'.
2026-04-26 02:52:53.634 +04:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (20ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
-- Normalize blank / whitespace Area to Ground
UPDATE [TableMasters]
SET [Area] = N'Ground'
WHERE [Area] IS NULL
   OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Area])) = N'';

-- Infer Area from table name when value is still default Ground (same rules as AddTableAreaToTableMaster)
UPDATE [TableMasters]
SET [Area] =
    CASE
        WHEN LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%non-ac%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%non ac%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%nonac%' THEN N'Non-AC'
        WHEN LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%outdoor%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%outside%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%patio%' THEN N'Outdoor'
        WHEN LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'% ac%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'ac %' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%(ac)%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%-ac%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%ac-%' THEN N'AC'
        WHEN LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%ground%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%g-floor%' OR LOWER([TableName]) LIKE N'%g floor%' THEN N'Ground'
        ELSE [Area]
    END
WHERE [Area] = N'Ground';

UPDATE [TableMasters]
SET [Area] = N'Ground'
WHERE [Area] IS NULL
   OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Area])) = N'';

-- Seed default sample tables for outlet 1 when each name is missing (non-deleted rows only)
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Outlets] WHERE [OutletId] = 1)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO [TableMasters] ([OutletId], [TableName], [Area], [Capacity], [IsOccupied], [IsActive], [IsDeleted], [CreatedAtUtc], [CreatedBy], [UpdatedAtUtc], [UpdatedBy], [DeletedAtUtc], [DeletedBy])
    SELECT v.[OutletId], v.[TableName], v.[Area], v.[Capacity], 0, 1, 0, SYSUTCDATETIME(), 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
    FROM (VALUES
        (1, N'Ground-1', N'Ground', 4),
        (1, N'Ground-2', N'Ground', 6),
        (1, N'AC-1', N'AC', 2),
        (1, N'AC-2', N'AC', 4),
        (1, N'NonAC-1', N'Non-AC', 4),
        (1, N'NonAC-2', N'Non-AC', 8),
        (1, N'Outdoor-1', N'Outdoor', 2),
        (1, N'Outdoor-2', N'Outdoor', 6)
    ) AS v([OutletId], [TableName], [Area], [Capacity])
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [TableMasters] t
        WHERE t.[OutletId] = v.[OutletId]
          AND t.[TableName] = v.[TableName]
          AND t.[IsDeleted] = 0
    );
END

VALUES (N'20260425225010_BackfillTableAreaAndSeedMissingTables', N'8.0.19');

SELECT [p].[PaymentMode], COALESCE(SUM([p].[Amount]), 0.0)
FROM [Payments] AS [p]
INNER JOIN (

FROM [Payments] AS [p]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[BillId], [b].[BusinessDate], [b].[OutletId], [b].[Status]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b]

) AS [t] ON [p].[BillId] = [t].[BillId]
WHERE [t].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [t].[BusinessDate] = @__today_1 AND [t].[Status] <> 3
GROUP BY [p].[PaymentMode]

SELECT [s].[ItemId], COALESCE((
    SELECT TOP(1) [s0].[RunningBalance]
    FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
    WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s0].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[ItemId] = [s0].[ItemId]
    ORDER BY [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId] DESC), 0.0) AS [Balance]
FROM [StockLedger] AS [s]

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT [i].[ItemId], [i].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s].[BusinessDate], [s].[CreatedAtUtc], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[DeletedAtUtc], [s].[DeletedBy], [s].[InQty], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ItemId], [s].[OutQty], [s].[OutletId], [s].[Rate], [s].[ReferenceId], [s].[ReferenceType], [s].[Remarks], [s].[RowVersion], [s].[RunningBalance], [s].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s]
        WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [i].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [i].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [i].[ItemId], [i].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [Items] AS [i0]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
            WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [i0].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [i0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i0].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i0].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [i].[ItemId] = [i0].[ItemId] AND [i].[ReorderLevel] = [i0].[ReorderLevel]
        ORDER BY [t0].[StockLedgerEntryId] DESC), 0.0) <= [i].[ReorderLevel]
) AS [t1]

    ELSE 0
END, [b0].[BillItemId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [b].[BillId], [b].[BillNo], [b].[GrandTotal], [b].[DiscountAmount], [b].[TableName], [b].[CustomerName], [b].[Phone], [b].[BillType], [b].[BillDate]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [b].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [b].[Status] = 0
    ORDER BY [b].[BillDate] DESC
) AS [t]
